rulings.Case Title: MARIA MAGDALENA BARRERA VS. MARIA BARRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Maria Magdelena Barerra'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 8, 2021 line 1. Plaintiff Maria Magdelena Barerra's Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR for department 501. This action was assigned to a trial department and all further motions are to be made in that department. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES JADALLAH VS. BEN CANNON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 8, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT BEN CANNON'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to June 15, 2021. Parties to deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings properly bound and tabbed no later than June 11, 2021 by noon. Parties may retrieve their respective unbound/untabbed previously submitted courtesy copies from department 501 outbox. Parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith no later than June 9, 2021 and submit a joint separate statement addressing the outstanding issues after good faith meet-and-confer efforts. Supplemental brief to be submitted no later than June 11, 2021 by noon. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
